completed: Fixed Co-Curricular API 400 Bad Request by standardizing departmentId handling
Enhanced CoCurricular UI with department selector for Admin and auto-detection for HoD
Implemented filtered coordinator selection based on department scope
Hardened co-curricular controllers with robust department scope guards
Updated Avatar menu to toggle on click for improved mobile responsiveness
API Performance Optimization Phase 1 (500 concurrent users):
- Fixed cache.js stdTTL from 10s to 60s (root cause of almost all cache misses)
- Added compound index { rollNo: 1, isActive: 1 } to Student model for faster student login
- Merged double NodueBatch queries in getPendingApprovals into a single query
- Removed unused Class.aggregate() in getFaculty (was computed but never read)
- Changed subjects Cache-Control from no-cache to private,max-age=300
- Fixed O(n) cache key scan in cacheHooks 'request' case → targeted cache.del
- Updated NodueRequest model hooks to directly invalidate batch_status:{batchId}
MongoDB transaction audit — all controllers verified to use safeTransaction wrappers
pending: Resolve MongoDB Change Stream dependency for standalone instances
Verify end-to-end clearance flow with actual coordinators
Pre-warm service (prewarmService.js) to prime caches before clearance deadlines
Consider bumping bcrypt cost factor awareness — login latency is dominated by bcrypt (~100ms, intentional)

decisions.context: Co-curricular items required departmentId but frontend was not sending it.
decisions.decision: Inferred departmentId from req.user on backend for HoDs; added explicit selector for Admin.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds one extra API call (getDepartments) for Admins on the co-curricular page.

decisions.context: Avatar menu only showed on hover, unreliable on mobile.
decisions.decision: Converted to state-driven click toggle with backdrop overlay.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds one click for desktop users who preferred hover, but fixes mobile.

decisions.context: Cache stdTTL was 10s — nearly every request was a cache miss at 500 concurrent users.
decisions.decision: Raised stdTTL to 60s (guide recommendation). Explicit per-key TTLs in withCache() calls remain unchanged.
decisions.trade_offs: Stale data window increases from 10s to 60s. Acceptable since model-level hooks still invalidate on write.

decisions.context: cacheHooks 'request' case was iterating all cache keys (O(n)) to find batch_status:* keys.
decisions.decision: Added direct cache.del(`batch_status:${doc.batchId}`) in NodueRequest hooks instead of scanning.
decisions.trade_offs: Requires batchId to be available on doc (it is — it's a required field on NodueRequest schema).

decisions.context: getFaculty was running Class.aggregate() whose result (classCounts) was declared but never used.
decisions.decision: Removed the dead aggregate call. Kept the two Class.find() queries that ARE used.
decisions.trade_offs: None — the aggregate output was never consumed by the response handler.
